title: Indopoa paupercula

taxonomy: Indopoa paupercula belongs to the family Aizoaceae. It is a genus of succulent plants native to South Africa. This genus is further classified under the order Caryophyllales and the class Magnoliopsida. Indopoa paupercula is closely related to other succulents in the family Aizoaceae, which includes plants like Lithops and Conophytum. The exact classification of Indopoa paupercula within the kingdom Plantae is also Plantae.
